<!--
Thanks for contributing to Benzene! Please fill in the sections below.
Keep PRs scoped to one logical change (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
-->

## What does this change do?

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (public API change — flag it; see VERSIONING.md)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build Benzene.sln` succeeds
- [ ] `dotnet test test/Benzene.Core.Test/Benzene.Test.csproj` passes
- [ ] If examples were touched, `dotnet build Benzene.Examples.sln` succeeds
- [ ] Public API changes are flagged and documented (CHANGELOG.md + XML docs)
- [ ] Package docs (`CLAUDE.md` / docs) match the actual behavior — no over-claiming
